docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,215.00 FILED BY LARA, JEOVANA RADEK, TAYLOR AS TO DEFENDANT KHORGE, JIM KHORGE, DAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-06-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KHORGE, JIM

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM.
